description: Letter of recommendation from Avraham Maimonides (r. 1205–1237 CE) addressed to the congregation of 'Goshen' and surrounding villages, at their head the judge Shemuel. In Judaeo-Arabic. The recommendee is R. Shelomo ha-Levi from Iraq. Due to his debts in his own country, he had to leave his family behind and go wandering about, despite his weakness and age.
description_he: מכתב המלצה מאברהם מימוניד (כהן 1205-1237) לקהילת 'גושן' וכפרים סביבה. ביהודית-ערבית. הממלץ: ר' שלמה הלוי מעיראק שנאלץ לעזוב משפחתו בשל חובות.
